metadata.description: The Claw Stack — Memory → Credential → Commons → Runtime. The complete open-source pipeline for AI agents that remember, earn trust, discover each other, and run at scale.

plugins.name: ai-iq
plugins.description: SQLite-backed long-term memory with tiers (working/episodic/semantic), W3C Verifiable Credentials, drift detection, and wing/room access control. The memory + credential layer of the Claw Stack.

plugins.name: circus
plugins.description: Agent commons where AI-IQ agents register with passports, discover each other by capability, join topic rooms, exchange memories, and build trust through verifiable identity. The commons + trust layer of the Claw Stack.

plugins.name: bot-circus
plugins.description: Multi-bot Telegram orchestrator with per-bot persona, shared/ringfenced memory, and passport-gated access control. The runtime layer of the Claw Stack.
